recommendedUse: forms with a small number of fields
lockedRules: root Grid attributes must match the template exactly
all generated list fields for the section must be inside the root Grid
each field cell must contain form_grid_field_title and form_grid_field_control
field controls must hide native Display title
field controls must use zero margin on all sides

templates.templateName: Data List Form Fields Grid v1.1
recommendedUse: dense public forms with shorter labels
business intake forms where multi-column scanning is preferable

templates.templateName: Data List Form Control Sub List v1.1
recommendedUse: public form sub-list fields when the field type is public-form-compatible and explicitly planned
templates.allowedHost: inside an approved field grid template under public-form-page-layout-standard
